title: Heroes of Envell
description: A mod about the Envell's heroes universe!
body:
This mod, created based on the animated series of the animated series “Heroes of Envell”, and at first glance does not offer anything new. He added 1 new craft it is laptop. By placing the laptop on the floor and opening it, you can go to a new dimension, where you will immediately be asked to choose one of the classes.

There are five classes in total. Knight, Mage, Thief, Engineer, and Thief.

Explore locations and travel. Fight monsters and bosses!
